productDisplayName: Converse Men's Chuck Slip Navy Red Canvas Shoe
description: For those who don't have time for laces we feel you. and that's why converse offers you these Chuck Taylor All Star Slip sneakers in its ultra-light avatar! The Slip features an ingenious built-in support beneath the tongue to give you a nice snug Fit without the constrictions of tying things up. With a deconstructed upper consisting of mesh and All Star embroidery, it's a unique look, too.Upper Mesh upper for easy maintenance and durability Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug fit Slip on system for comfort Moc metallic eyelets on the sides for style All Star patch on the tongue Midsole Comfort Insole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioning Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Diamond-shaped suction grooves on the forefoot and heel, with textured grooves on the toe region and heel region for superior grip on all terrains shoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
